module_sme_rollup.name: Customer Data & Relationships
module_sme_rollup.description: Unified customer master with complete interaction history, consent compliance, and data quality.

statements.text: Store and maintain contact and account master records with hierarchies, roles, and multi-address support.
statements.rationale: Single source of truth for customer identity

statements.text: Track all customer interactions chronologically across calls, emails, meetings, and notes in unified feed.
Detect and merge duplicate contacts and accounts to maintain data integrity and prevent fragmentation.
statements.rationale: Eliminate redundancy and improve data quality

statements.text: Capture and enforce GDPR and PDPA consent flags with automatic data retention and deletion policies.
Segment customers using tags, custom attributes, and behavioral data for targeted engagement.
statements.rationale: Enable personalized marketing and sales strategies

statements.text: Link social media profiles to contacts and consolidate messages from all platforms into unified inbox.

module_sme_rollup.name: Sales Pipeline & Opportunity Management
module_sme_rollup.description: End-to-end opportunity tracking from lead capture through close with visibility and forecasting.

statements.text: Capture leads from web forms, email, imports, API, and phone with automatic source and channel tracking.
Qualify and score leads using rules-based and predictive models; assign to sales representatives automatically.
Convert qualified leads to opportunities while preserving full history and audit trail for analysis.
statements.rationale: Track conversion metrics and sales effectiveness

statements.text: Configure flexible sales stages by team or product line with drag-and-drop pipeline visualization.
Assign opportunities with defined owner, team, and manager visibility; track win probability and forecast amount.
Support line items within opportunities with product selection, pricing, and competitor tracking per deal.
statements.rationale: Detailed deal structure and competitive positioning

statements.text: Record lost opportunities with configurable reason codes for win-loss analysis and process improvement.
statements.rationale: Learn from losses to improve sales effectiveness

module_sme_rollup.name: Orders, Pricing & Revenue
module_sme_rollup.description: Order-to-cash execution with flexible pricing, discounts, and recurring revenue management.

statements.text: Create orders with line items, quantities, and prices; generate invoices and track status through delivery.
Create quotations, convert to orders, and handle partial shipments, amendments, and delivery notes.
Maintain multiple price lists by customer group, region, currency, and category with automatic application.
Define quantity-based volume discounts and configure approval workflows with role-based pricing authority.
statements.rationale: Control margin while enabling sales flexibility

statements.text: Create time-bound promotions and manage coupon codes with redemption rules, limits, and expiration.
Automatically generate recurring invoices on configured billing schedule; manage subscription state changes.
Calculate pro-rated charges for mid-cycle upgrades and downgrades; recover failed payments with dunning.
statements.rationale: Maximize subscription revenue and reduce churn

statements.text: Customize order and invoice templates with company branding; maintain complete audit trail of all changes.

module_sme_rollup.name: Customer Engagement & Retention
module_sme_rollup.description: Marketing automation, loyalty programs, and customer service to drive engagement and lifetime value.

statements.text: Build and send email campaigns with drag-and-drop templates and personalization; segment dynamically by behavior.
Automate customer journeys with trigger-based workflows for lifecycle and behavioral events across channels.
Measure campaign ROI by attributing revenue to channels; test variations and schedule social media posts.
Define loyalty program mechanics with points earning, tiered membership, and automated reward redemption.
statements.rationale: Increase customer retention and lifetime value

statements.text: Automatically award points for purchases, visits, referrals, and reviews; manage expiry and clawback on returns.
Capture cases from email, phone, chat, social media, and web; route automatically by skill and track SLA.
Provide knowledge base and access customer transaction history within case view for faster resolution.
statements.rationale: Empower agents to resolve issues efficiently

statements.text: Build surveys with multiple question types; calculate NPS, CSAT, and CES with trend analysis and segmentation.

module_sme_rollup.name: Sales Visibility & Analytics
module_sme_rollup.description: Real-time dashboards, reporting, and forecasting for sales performance and customer insights.

statements.text: Provide role-based dashboards for sales reps, managers, and executives with real-time sales and order visibility.
statements.rationale: Actionable insights for all stakeholder levels

statements.text: Analyze pipeline funnel with conversion rates by stage, product, rep, source, and region; drill to transactions.
statements.rationale: Identify bottlenecks and optimize sales process

statements.text: Track sales rep activity metrics linked to outcomes; measure lead conversion and lead-to-customer rates.
statements.rationale: Correlate activity to results for coaching

statements.text: Calculate customer lifetime value, acquisition cost, and retention rates; segment by source and attributes.
statements.rationale: Optimize customer acquisition and retention ROI

statements.text: Report monthly and annual recurring revenue, churn trends, and product performance by category and velocity.
statements.rationale: Monitor business health and growth drivers

statements.text: Build custom reports with drag-and-drop interface; schedule email delivery to stakeholders automatically.

module_sme_rollup.name: Platform & Integration
module_sme_rollup.description: Mobile access, data security, user management, and system integration for operational excellence.

statements.text: Provide web and native mobile applications accessible on phones, tablets, and desktops with responsive design.
Record customer interactions and notes from mobile devices; sync calendar with Google, Outlook, and Apple.
statements.rationale: Capture activity in real-time from field

statements.text: Support integrated voice calling, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat within CRM with automatic call logging.
Create individual user accounts with role-based access control; enforce two-factor authentication and SSO.
Maintain comprehensive audit logs of user access, data modifications, and system changes with timestamps.
Import customer data from CSV or Excel; export to CSV, Excel, or PDF; provide API for custom integrations.
statements.rationale: Flexible data movement and system connectivity

statements.text: Connect to accounting software, POS, and inventory systems; synchronize data and schedule automated backups.
statements.rationale: Unified business data and disaster recovery

statements.text: Encrypt customer data at rest and in transit; meet PSG Cyber Essentials baseline security requirements.

Platform & Data.narrative: This family provides the foundational infrastructure for your CRM—a single source of truth for all customer and contact information, accessible from any device, with built-in security and integration to your existing tools. Singapore SMEs rely on this to keep customer data clean, compliant with PDPA, and accessible to the whole team whether they're in the office or on the road. Without it, you'll have scattered spreadsheets, missed follow-ups, and data breaches.

Sales Pipeline.narrative: This family turns your sales process into a visible, manageable workflow—capturing leads, tracking opportunities through stages, logging every customer interaction, and converting them into orders and invoices. For a Singapore SME, this means you can see exactly where deals are stuck, forecast revenue with confidence, and ensure no prospect falls through the cracks. A typical scenario: your sales team knows which leads are hot, which need follow-up, and when to expect payment.

Marketing.narrative: This family automates your marketing outreach—sending targeted campaigns, building your web presence, monitoring social media conversations, and gathering customer feedback—all without hiring a dedicated marketing team. Singapore SMEs benefit by reaching more prospects cost-effectively, understanding what customers think, and nurturing leads automatically while your sales team closes deals. A concrete example: you run an email campaign to past customers, track who opens it, and automatically follow up with the hot prospects.

Commerce.narrative: This family enables you to sell online and build customer loyalty—whether through a direct e-commerce store, subscription billing, or a rewards program that keeps customers coming back. Singapore SMEs use this to diversify revenue streams beyond direct sales and create recurring, predictable income. A typical scenario: you launch an online store for weekend shoppers, then add a loyalty program so repeat customers get discounts and feel valued.

Customer Service.narrative: This family organizes customer support into a structured workflow—tickets, routing, SLAs, and a knowledge base—so every issue is tracked and resolved on time. Singapore SMEs need this to respond quickly to complaints, avoid losing customers to poor service, and build a reputation for reliability. When a customer emails a problem, it's automatically logged, assigned to the right person, and tracked until it's solved.

Analytics.narrative: This family gives you visibility into your sales performance through dashboards and reports—pipeline health, win rates, conversion funnels, and customer trends. Singapore SMEs use this to spot bottlenecks, make data-driven decisions, and prove ROI to investors or lenders. Instead of guessing whether your sales strategy is working, you see exactly which products sell, which reps perform best, and where to invest next.
